subject: Bigger than the Superbowl?
body:
Only three weeks

Alex here.

3-week reminder until $100M Leads.

Just so you know…

In the last couple of days, we've added just over 94,000 people (!!) to the waitlist.

It's getting real.

Talk soon.

Alex

FYI: To get a behind-the-scenes breakdown of how we've done this, join the live virtual event on Saturday, August 19th, 9 am PST/12pm PST

I've had a tonne of people ask where the launch is.

The event is online.

For context - it would take 13 Madison Square Gardens at full capacity (or the whole of Disneyland) to hold everyone.

^ Power of $100M Leads btw.

Good news - if you're getting this email you are already registered.

Check your inbox for the email: "You're registered! (Save this email)"

(We will also send you a magic link a couple of times in the coming weeks. That way, you'll easily get in - when the time comes.)

Look out for those emails. The team and I have got you covered.

P.P.S. - I've put a little over $1,000,000 into this book launch with one single goal: to blow you away with value. I'd love it if you let me.

See you soon.
